name: Gory Gorilla Tonsils
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the Brussels sprouts and remove any discolored leaves.
2. Trim off the stem ends and cut an X into the bottom of each sprout to ensure even cooking.
3. Place the sprouts in a pot containing about 2 inches of water and sprinkle with salt.
4. Cover the pot and bring it to a boil over medium heat.
5. After boiling for 8-10 minutes, carefully test a few sprouts with a fork to check for tenderness.
6. Once tender, remove the pot from the heat and drain the sprouts in a colander.
7. Place the grated cheese in a small saucepan and add milk.
8. Simmer over low heat, stirring continuously until the cheese melts.
9. Remove the saucepan from the heat when the cheese has melted.
10. Arrange a bed of washed lettuce leaves on a platter.
11. Place the cooked Brussels sprouts (tonsils) in pairs on the leaves.
12. Drizzle the melted cheese over the tonsils.
13. Sprinkle with paprika and serve.
